title: Kordon Sunset
description: Spend a themed day in Izmir: visit the Clock Tower of Izmir, enjoy a coffee at Kordon Alsancak Izmir, and relax at Kordon Cafe bar.
notes: Start with the symbol of Izmir.
Walk on the grass overlooking the sea, and wait for sunset.
A coffee with a view of the gulf.
Free public restrooms along the coast.
